summary: Iteration 93 testing complete. SSHR and HR Attendance fixes verified. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly via API and UI screenshots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 93 SSHR and HR Attendance fixes fully tested. Key verifications: 1) SSHR overview shows 'Days Present (Month)' and 'Hours Worked (Month)' instead of weekly stats. 2) SSHR Attendance tab shows calendar grid with Mon-Sun columns and color-coded cells. 3) Only Sundays are marked as weekend/off (Saturdays are working days). 4) HR Attendance page shows 'No Record' card with count of employees who didn't punch in. 5) Missing employees displayed at bottom of attendance table with 'No Record' badge. 6) Late minutes recalculated using current shift config - Rashida (30001) on 2026-03-23 shows late_minutes=0 (punched in at 10:13, within 30min grace). 7) API endpoints return correct data structures with missing_employees array and summary.no_record count.

sshr_monthly_stats.details: SSHR overview shows 'Days Present (Month)' = 10 and 'Hours Worked (Month)' = 127.7 for Falja

sshr_calendar_view.details: Attendance tab shows calendar grid with Mon-Sun columns, color-coded cells for present/absent/late/holiday/weekend

sunday_only_weekend.details: Only Sundays (dow=6) marked as weekend. Saturdays are working days. Verified via API: 5 weekends in March 2026 (all Sundays)

hr_attendance_no_record_card.details: HR Attendance page shows 'No Record' card with count (15 on 2026-03-23)

hr_attendance_missing_employees.details: Missing employees displayed at bottom of table with 'No Record' badge and employee details

late_minutes_recalculation.details: Rashida (30001) on 2026-03-23: biometric_in=10:13:59, late_minutes=0 (within 30min grace period)

api_my_monthly_attendance.details: Returns days array with is_weekend=true only for Sundays, summary with all counts, shift info

api_hr_attendance.details: Returns records, missing_employees array, summary with no_record count, team_strength breakdown

api_ess_dashboard.details: Returns monthly_summary with present, absent, half_day, late, total_hours

sunday_no_missing_employees.details: HR attendance for Sunday (2026-03-22) returns missing_employees=[] (day off)
